body:
Some names were changed in integrated land model that break the nightly amip simulations (we are running them using the main branch for faster testing). 

I'm guessing that this PR will break integrated land tests that are running against the last released version (but lets see). Maybe it would be cleaner to do a release in land model and update the coupler accordingly?

CC: @AlexisRenchon @juliasloan25 ?
title: CO2 name change in integrated land

body: There were some documentation that was not rendered correctly, because it didn't match with what Documenter.jl was expecting.
title: Fix formatting in docs
